title: tournaya gossweileri
intro: Tournaya gossweileri, also known as the African cherry or stinkwood, is a plant species that belongs to the family Sapotaceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Tournaya gossweileri include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
